reward.name: Zoo Ticket
reward.message: Twinkle gives you a Zoo Ticket!
reward.voiceText: You got a Zoo Ticket! You are an Animal Finder!

1.title: Animal Footprint Tracker
1.storyIntro: Star Guardian! The zoo animals ran away, but they left footprints behind! Find the footprint cards hidden at home, then match each footprint to the right animal.

cards.hintText: This animal swings from trees and loves bananas. Look where things climb high...
cards.foundText: You found the Monkey card! The letter is... W!

cards.hintText: The king of the jungle! Has a big fluffy mane. Look where something roars...
cards.foundText: You found the Lion card! The letter is... I!

cards.hintText: Black and white, soft and cuddly. Loves bamboo. Look where it's cozy and quiet...
cards.foundText: You found the Panda card! The letter is... L!

cards.hintText: Orange with black stripes. Very fast and strong! Look where things pounce and play...
cards.foundText: You found the Tiger card! The letter is... D!

1.completionText: W-I-L-D! That spells WILD! All the zoo animals are free! 🦁🐯🐼🐵

reward.name: Pattern Book
reward.message: Twinkle gives you a Pattern Book!
reward.voiceText: You got a Pattern Book! You are a Pattern Expert!

2.title: Animal Pattern Puzzle
2.storyIntro: The animals are back, but their skin patterns are all mixed up! Can you put the right pattern on each animal? Stripes, spots, or scales — match them carefully!

patternAnimals.speechText: A zebra has black and white stripes!
A tiger has orange and black stripes!

2.findPrompt: Find something at home with stripes, spots, or scales!
2.completionText: Amazing! All the animals have their patterns back. Stripes, spots, and scales! 🦓🐆🐯🐍

reward.name: Conductor Baton
reward.message: Twinkle gives you a Conductor Baton!
reward.voiceText: You got a Conductor Baton! You are the Choir Leader!

3.title: Animal Choir Rhythm
3.storyIntro: The animals want to sing in a choir! Listen to the conductor, then tap the animals in the same order. Can you keep the rhythm?
3.completionText: Moo! Baa! Neigh! Oink! Cluck! The animal choir sounds wonderful! 🎵

reward.name: Shadow Mask
reward.message: Twinkle gives you a Shadow Mask!
reward.voiceText: You got a Shadow Mask! You can copy any animal!

4.title: Animal Shadow Mimic
4.storyIntro: Look at the animal shadow! Can you copy its pose? Ask your Earth Helper to check if you look just like the animal!
4.completionText: You moved like all the animals! Hop, stomp, swim, fly, crawl! You're the best animal shadow! 💃🐾

reward.name: Shelter Heart
reward.message: Twinkle gives you a Shelter Heart!
reward.voiceText: You got a Shelter Heart! You are an Animal Shelter Architect!

5.title: Build an Animal Shelter
5.storyIntro: The baby animal is safe! Now it needs a cozy home. You and your Earth Helper can build a little shelter together. Then tell Twinkle all about it!

buildSteps.title: Find a Home Base
buildSteps.instruction: Find a small box, basket, or towel. This is the animal's home.

buildSteps.title: Make a Bed
buildSteps.instruction: Add something soft: a small towel, tissue, or cloth.

buildSteps.title: Add Food and Water
buildSteps.instruction: Make a tiny bowl from paper or a bottle cap.

buildSteps.title: Decorate
buildSteps.instruction: Draw or add one thing to make the shelter special.

descriptionPrompts.question: What animal lives in your shelter?
What is the shelter made of?
descriptionPrompts.hint: Say: It is made of a box and a towel.

descriptionPrompts.question: How does the animal feel?
descriptionPrompts.hint: Say: The tiger is happy and safe!

5.puzzleMessage: One piece is missing... Ask your Earth Helper for the Heart Piece!
5.plantMessage: The baby animal needs a home! Earth Helper: help your child build a small shelter with things around the house.
5.certificateSubtext: has completed all 5 Animal Adventures and built a cozy shelter for the rescued animals! Thank you for being kind to animals. Be a friend to all creatures every day!
5.completionText: We did it! The baby animal has a warm home. You are a true Animal Shelter Architect! 🐾❤️
